headlines.title: Ghalibaf: End of war in Lebanon key part of Islamabad MoU
headlines.snippet: Tehran, IRNA – Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf says that the end of the war in Lebanon, along with ensuring the country’s sovereignty and territorial integrity, is a key component of the first clause of the Islamabad memorandum of understanding (MoU) between Iran and the United States.

headlines.title: Iranian WhartoCell medicine for osteoarthritis treatment receives IFDA authorization
